channel.title: GitHub HCL Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of HCL in GitHub

item.title: philips-labs/terraform-aws-github-runner
item.description: Terraform module for scalable GitHub action runners on AWS

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
item.description: Terraform module to create Amazon Elastic Kubernetes (EKS) resources 🇺🇦

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-ecs
item.description: Terraform module to create AWS ECS resources 🇺🇦

item.title: btkrausen/hashicorp
item.description: Random code for HashiCorp related projects, training, etc.

item.title: GoogleCloudPlatform/cloud-foundation-fabric
item.description: End-to-end modular samples and landing zones toolkit for Terraform on GCP.

item.title: bridgecrewio/terragoat
item.description: TerraGoat is Bridgecrew's "Vulnerable by Design" Terraform repository. TerraGoat is a learning and training project that demonstrates how common configuration errors can find their way into production cloud environments.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-s3-bucket
item.description: Terraform module that creates an S3 bucket with an optional IAM user for external CI/CD systems

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-vpc
item.description: Terraform module to create AWS VPC resources 🇺🇦

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-rds-aurora
item.description: Terraform module to create AWS RDS Aurora resources 🇺🇦

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-ec2-instance
item.description: Terraform module to create AWS EC2 instance(s) resources 🇺🇦

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-network
item.description: Sets up a new VPC network on Google Cloud

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-example-foundation
item.description: Shows how the CFT modules can be composed to build a secure cloud foundation

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-lambda
item.description: Terraform module, which takes care of a lot of AWS Lambda/serverless tasks (build dependencies, packages, updates, deployments) in countless combinations 🇺🇦

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-iam
item.description: Terraform module to create AWS IAM resources 🇺🇦
